name: IdsEdwComsnMnlAdjLoad

text.value: WITH stg AS (SELECT COMSN_MNL_ADJ_SK, SRC_SYS_CD, AGNT_ID, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_SEQ_NO, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_PD_DT_SK, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, AGNT_SK, PD_AGNT_SK, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_LOB_CD, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_LOB_NM, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_PAYMT_TYP_CD, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_PAYMT_TYP_NM, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_RSN_CD, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_RSN_NM, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_STTUS_CD, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_STTUS_NM, BM_IN, COMSN_AGMNT_EFF_DT_SK, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_AMT, COMSN_ARGMT_ID, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_DESC, PD_AGNT_ID, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_LOB_CD_SK, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_PAYMT_TYP_CD_SK, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_RSN_CD_SK, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_STTUS_CD_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.TMP_IdsEdwComsnMnlAdjLoad) UPDATE T SET T.SRC_SYS_CD = stg.SRC_SYS_CD, T.AGNT_ID = stg.AGNT_ID, T.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_SEQ_NO = stg.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_SEQ_NO, T.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_PD_DT_SK = stg.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_PD_DT_SK, T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK = stg.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, T.AGNT_SK = stg.AGNT_SK, T.PD_AGNT_SK = stg.PD_AGNT_SK, T.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_LOB_CD = stg.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_LOB_CD, T.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_LOB_NM = stg.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_LOB_NM, T.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_PAYMT_TYP_CD = stg.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_PAYMT_TYP_CD, T.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_PAYMT_TYP_NM = stg.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_PAYMT_TYP_NM, T.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_RSN_CD = stg.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_RSN_CD, T.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_RSN_NM = stg.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_RSN_NM, T.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_STTUS_CD = stg.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_STTUS_CD, T.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_STTUS_NM = stg.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_STTUS_NM, T.BM_IN = stg.BM_IN, T.COMSN_AGMNT_EFF_DT_SK = stg.COMSN_AGMNT_EFF_DT_SK, T.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_AMT = stg.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_AMT, T.COMSN_ARGMT_ID = stg.COMSN_ARGMT_ID, T.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_DESC = stg.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_DESC, T.PD_AGNT_ID = stg.PD_AGNT_ID, T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = stg.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, T.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_LOB_CD_SK = stg.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_LOB_CD_SK, T.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_PAYMT_TYP_CD_SK = stg.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_PAYMT_TYP_CD_SK, T.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_RSN_CD_SK = stg.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_RSN_CD_SK, T.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_STTUS_CD_SK = stg.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_STTUS_CD_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_F T JOIN stg ON T.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_SK = stg.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_SK; WITH stg2 AS (SELECT COMSN_MNL_ADJ_SK, SRC_SYS_CD, AGNT_ID, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_SEQ_NO, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_PD_DT_SK, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, AGNT_SK, PD_AGNT_SK, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_LOB_CD, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_LOB_NM, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_PAYMT_TYP_CD, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_PAYMT_TYP_NM, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_RSN_CD, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_RSN_NM, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_STTUS_CD, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_STTUS_NM, BM_IN, COMSN_AGMNT_EFF_DT_SK, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_AMT, COMSN_ARGMT_ID, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_DESC, PD_AGNT_ID, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_LOB_CD_SK, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_PAYMT_TYP_CD_SK, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_RSN_CD_SK, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_STTUS_CD_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.TMP_IdsEdwComsnMnlAdjLoad) INSERT INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_F (COMSN_MNL_ADJ_SK, SRC_SYS_CD, AGNT_ID, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_SEQ_NO, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_PD_DT_SK, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, AGNT_SK, PD_AGNT_SK, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_LOB_CD, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_LOB_NM, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_PAYMT_TYP_CD, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_PAYMT_TYP_NM, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_RSN_CD, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_RSN_NM, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_STTUS_CD, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_STTUS_NM, BM_IN, COMSN_AGMNT_EFF_DT_SK, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_AMT, COMSN_ARGMT_ID, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_DESC, PD_AGNT_ID, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_LOB_CD_SK, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_PAYMT_TYP_CD_SK, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_RSN_CD_SK, COMSN_MNL_ADJ_STTUS_CD_SK) SELECT stg2.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_SK, stg2.SRC_SYS_CD, stg2.AGNT_ID, stg2.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_SEQ_NO, stg2.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_PD_DT_SK, stg2.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, stg2.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, stg2.AGNT_SK, stg2.PD_AGNT_SK, stg2.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_LOB_CD, stg2.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_LOB_NM, stg2.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_PAYMT_TYP_CD, stg2.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_PAYMT_TYP_NM, stg2.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_RSN_CD, stg2.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_RSN_NM, stg2.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_STTUS_CD, stg2.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_STTUS_NM, stg2.BM_IN, stg2.COMSN_AGMNT_EFF_DT_SK, stg2.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_AMT, stg2.COMSN_ARGMT_ID, stg2.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_DESC, stg2.PD_AGNT_ID, stg2.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, stg2.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, stg2.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_LOB_CD_SK, stg2.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_PAYMT_TYP_CD_SK, stg2.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_RSN_CD_SK, stg2.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_STTUS_CD_SK FROM stg2 LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_F T ON T.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_SK = stg2.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_SK WHERE T.COMSN_MNL_ADJ_SK IS NULL
